title: Bhala Manus
subTitle: Shankar, a young man from a rural area, tries to turn his life around after entering a world of smuggling after travelling to Mumbai.

title: Pratigyabadh
subTitle: Shankar grows up to become the right hand man of a gangster. His goal in life is to take revenge on the moneylender who left his family homeless and a truck driver who molested and killed his mother.

title: Badrinath Yatra
subTitle: After Devdutt gets arrested, his mother, who is about to go on a pilgrimage, cancels her trip. Things take a turn for the worse when he starts visiting a brothel and ignores his pregnant wife.

title: Kirayadar
subTitle: When Anil, son of their absentee landlord, arrives in Mumbai and asks them to move out of his home, Laxmi and Jaya's lives turn chaotic.

title: Batwara
subTitle: Amidst the fall of princely states in post-independence India, the friendship between aristocrat Vikram and a peasant is tested. Vikram turns vengeful after his brother is killed in a peasant colony.

title: New Delhi
subTitle: An honest journalist, is declared unstable and falsely imprisoned after he exposes two corrupt politicians. Years later, he returns to seek revenge against his wrongdoers.

title: Sautela Bhai
subTitle: A teacher betroths his stepbrother to the daughter of a rich man but discovers that he is already married. However, things take a turn when the girl's father finds out.

title: Shaan
subTitle: After their cop brother dies at the hands of a ruthless gangster, Vijay and Ravi are determined to find the gangster and take their revenge.

title: Agnee Prem
subTitle: Sangeeta, the daughter of business tycoon Seth Deen Dayal and Rahul, a middle-class boy, fall deeply in love. However, their union is threatened by various obstacles that challenge their love.
